description: The shared practices, beliefs, and expressions of a community; the living way passed between generations. 'Moenu' names what communities grow—the garden of shared meaning.
sound_symbolism: The word moves with inheritance. 'Mo' shapes with shared patterns, ways moving. 'E' eases into natural expression, culture breathing. 'Nu' nurtures with passed-down care, tradition tended.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo moenu' (the culture). What 'punoa' (society) expresses. Contains 'keno' (custom) and 'thama' (tradition).

pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Culture as inheritance—the ways passed down that teach how to live well.
pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Culture as expression—the flowering of shared creativity and beauty.
